title: nervilia umbrosa
intro: Nervilia umbrosa, also known as the pale yellow nerf or the shadowy nerf, is a species of orchid that belongs to the genus Nervilia and is native to tropical Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nervilia umbrosa include its ability to treat fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Nervilia umbrosa is typically prepared as a decoction or a tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
